epigraph.quote: Simon + Thomas had bought us ice creams for our picnic lunch.

moments.quote: We had breakfast 3½ miles from Naseby.
+ drove on to Thorpenes. We used the new A14, the new M1 A1 interlink which opened 4 days ago by-passing Market Harborough + Kettering.
Simon + Thomas had bought us ice creams for our picnic lunch. 8 m. west of Huntingdon
